theme: 一只宠物登机软包，为什么“带它一起飞”正在变成新的情绪消费门槛

items.source: 01_出发前门口的宠物登机软包.png
items.title: 出发前门口的宠物登机软包
items.description: 真正让人停下来点开的，不是宠物本身，而是那只已经被认真打包到像婴儿行李一样的软包。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a pet airline carrier bag packed by the apartment door before departure, folded blanket, collapsible water bowl, passport pouch and leash nearby, realistic Xiaohongshu save-worthy home scene, soft morning light, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 02_机场地毯上的软包和主人鞋尖.png
items.title: 机场地毯上的软包和主人鞋尖
items.description: 机场值机前最明显的情绪消费证据，往往是主人脚边那只被小心放平的登机软包。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, pet carrier bag resting on airport carpet beside the owner's shoes before check-in, subtle travel tension, soft terminal lighting, realistic modern travel aesthetic, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 值机柜台边的折叠水碗
items.description: 一只小小折叠水碗，会把“它是家人”这件事画得比任何文案都更直接。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, small collapsible pet water bowl beside an airline carrier at a check-in counter edge, realistic travel gear details, muted terminal background, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 04_安检传送带前抱起软包的一瞬.png
items.title: 安检传送带前抱起软包的一瞬
items.description: 抱起软包过安检的那几秒，整趟旅程的紧张和偏爱都会被压缩进一个动作里。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a person lifting a soft pet carrier before airport security conveyor belt, candid motion, practical travel clothing, clean realistic terminal scene, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 05_候机区腿边露出的安抚毯角.png
items.title: 候机区腿边露出的安抚毯角
items.description: 露出来的一角安抚毯，比任何高价旅行攻略都更像这代人的情绪预算。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, pet carrier under an airport seat with a comfort blanket corner visible, owner sitting nearby, calm waiting-gate mood, intimate observational style, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 登机口窗边的软包侧影
items.description: 窗边的那只软包，会让“带它一起飞”突然从幻想变成现实花销。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, silhouette of a pet carrier by a large boarding gate window, plane outside softly blurred, realistic travel atmosphere, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 07_宠物友好酒店床角的临时安顿.png
items.title: 宠物友好酒店床角的临时安顿
items.description: 到了酒店先摆好的不是行李，而是它的窝和水碗，这种优先级本身就很有讨论度。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, pet-friendly hotel room with soft carrier, folded pet bed and water bowl arranged at the bed corner, warm lamp light, refined but realistic travel lifestyle, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 08_夜路打车时怀里的登机软包.png
items.title: 夜路打车时怀里的登机软包
items.description: 深夜打车抱着软包的样子，比白天合影更能说明宠物旅行到底有多像带孩子出门。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, person holding a pet carrier while waiting for a night taxi on a city curb, street reflections, candid urban travel realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 09_民宿木地板上的旅行水碗和零食袋.png
items.title: 民宿木地板上的旅行水碗和零食袋
items.description: 真正花钱的不是机票本身，而是这一地为它准备好的细小安心。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, travel pet bowl and treat pouch on a homestay wooden floor beside a soft carrier, tactile everyday details, natural window light, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 10_返程高铁座位下的宠物软包.png
items.title: 返程高铁座位下的宠物软包
items.description: 返程时塞在座位下的软包，会让旅程看起来更像一场需要复盘的亲密劳动。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, soft pet carrier tucked under a high-speed rail seat on the return trip, owner bag and shoes nearby, realistic Chinese travel scene, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 摊开的旅行预算小物桌面
items.description: 软包、尿垫、零食、水碗摊开在桌上时，“带它一起飞”这件事的门槛才真正可视化。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, tabletop spread of pet travel essentials including soft carrier accessories, pee pads, snacks and collapsible bowl, save-worthy flat lay with tactile realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 回家后收进柜子的空软包
items.description: 旅行结束后被收起来的空软包，会让人重新想起这趟路到底是为谁绕的。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, empty pet airline carrier being stored back in a home closet after travel, quiet post-trip mood, soft evening light, realistic domestic scene, no logos, no readable text.
